languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

languages.text: "Не дрейфь, Джай. Голосочки мне недавно намекнули: если не уничтожим гадину, застрянем в этой дыре надолго. А с развлечениями здесь негусто, сама видишь..."
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: 「心配しないで、ジェイ。最近、小さな声たちが私に言っているのは、この悪党を倒さなければ、この穴に長く閉じ込められるということ。そして、ここには娯楽が豊富にあるわけじゃない、わかるでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

traits.locale_text: 「心配しないで、ジェ。最近、小さな声たちが私に言っているのは、この悪党を倒さなければ、この穴に長く閉じ込められるということ。そして、ここには娯楽が豊富にあるわけじゃない、わかるでしょう？」

languages.text: « Ne vous inquiétez pas, Jae. Les petites voix me disent que si nous ne tuons pas cette vermine, nous allons rester coincés dans ce trou pendant un bon bout de temps. Et on ne peut pas dire que nous ayons l'embarras du choix en matière de divertissement, comme vous pouvez le voir... »
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous inquiétez pas, Jae. Les petites voix me disent que si nous ne tuons pas cette vermine, nous allons rester coincés dans ce trou pendant un bon bout de temps. Et on ne peut pas dire que nous ayons l'embarras du choix en matière de divertissement, comme vous pouvez le voir... »

languages.text: "Keine Sorge, Jae. Die Flüsterstimmen haben mir kürzlich erzählt, dass wir lange Zeit in diesem Loch festsitzen werden, wenn wir diesen Abschaum nicht vernichten. Und es wird uns nicht an Unterhaltung mangeln, wie Ihr sehen könnt ..."
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

traits.locale_text: "Keine Sorge, Jae. Die Flüsterstimmen haben mir kürzlich erzählt, dass wir lange Zeit in diesem Loch festsitzen werden, wenn wir diesen Abschaum nicht vernichten. Und es wird uns nicht an Unterhaltung mangeln, wie Ihr sehen könnt ..."

languages.text: "Endişelenme Jae. Küçük sesler bana bu pisliği yok etmezsek uzun süre bu delikte tıkılıp kalacağımızı söylüyor. Gördüğün üzere burada bizi eğlendirebilecek pek bir şey de yok..."
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

traits.locale_text: "Endişelenme Jae. Küçük sesler bana bu pisliği yok etmezsek uzun süre bu delikte tıkılıp kalacağımızı söylüyor. Gördüğün üzere burada bizi eğlendirebilecek pek bir şey de yok..."

languages.text: «Descuide, Jae. Las vocecillas me han dicho que, si no destruimos a esta escoria, nos quedaremos mucho tiempo atrapados en este agujero. Y como puede ver, aquí hay poco más que hacer para divertirse...».
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."

traits.locale_text: «Descuide, Jae. Las vocecillas me han dicho que, si no destruimos a esta escoria, nos quedaremos mucho tiempo atrapados en este agujero. Y como puede ver, aquí hay poco más que hacer para divertirse...».

languages.text: “别担心，婕伊。那些低语最近一直在我耳边念叨：要是不灭了这渣滓，咱们就得在这鬼地方困上好一阵子。而且你也瞧见了，这儿的‘娱乐活动’可谈不上丰富……”
languages.original_text: "Don't worry, Jae. The little voices have been telling me lately that if we don't destroy this scum, we're going to be stuck in this hole for a long time. And we're not exactly spoiled for entertainment here, as you can see..."
